transcript.text:
[1st Period: English]
[Figure out what kind of food he is describing]
[Give up on subtitles]
[Do you understand?]
['Yes' to everything]
[The answer was brisket]
[Now, this is for the viewers:]
[2nd Period: Math]
[Calculate how much her bill will be] [The winner will receive a 30,000 Won gift card to Leechadol]
[A total of 50 winners will be picked]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Leechadol located in Hongdae
The owner of Leechadol told me that I can eat as much as I want
So I'm going to eat both lunch and dinner here
Yay, exciting
[Leechadol, city of Hongdae]

I'm here during their lunch hour
So I'll order from their lunch menu
I'm going to eat as much as I want
There will be a small gift to 50 of you guys who guess the total cost of the bill Leave your email as well
Get your calculators ready!
This is beef bulgogi (marinated beef stew)
This is still beef
Isn't 6,900 Won (~$6 USD) per person considered really cheap?
Hello
[A good looking server]
Beef bulgogi stew, spicy noodles, bibimbap (assorted vegetables with rice), baguette,
Just give me everything here
3 servings for the beef bulgogi stew, please
I will be your personal waiter today
[Leechadol Beef Bulgogi Stew 6,900 Won X 3
[Bánh Mi Baguette 1,900 Won]

[Vegetables Bibimbap 2,900 Won]
[Spicy Vegetable Noodles 2,900 Won]
Here you are Thank you
I'm from America
A U.S. citizen?
Yes
I'm from Seattle
You went to New York to eat steak, right?
Yes I did
[All of a sudden?!]
[You said you've been to New York!]
[The editor gives up on subtitles]
[He finds this funny too]
[Let's stop communicating]
[Thank you Sejong the Great]
[13:00 lunch start time]

The fire is...
Is there a problem?
[Let's just laugh it off]
Let's eat 1 first
This is egg tart sauce
He said to put the bulgogi in here
Just like this
The bread is so good
The outside is really crispy
Inside is soft
[It's good with shredded radish
[Seattle Style] Thank you
He said it's better with this inside
I can't imagine how this will taste like
The texture of the radish makes it better
With radish

What to eat next?
Noodles! Before it gets soggy
Some beef bulgogi with the noodles
You really can't go wrong with this combination
It's a bit spicy
So the sweetness of beef bulgogi really complements the taste
Cleared
This time,
Should I mix some glass noodles inside the bibimbap?
With bulgogi
[Looks scrumptious]
This is the real happiness of 2,900 Won (~$2.50 USD)
I really like the fact that you can have your preference of rice vs noodles
Bon appetit
Delicious
Do you have Fanta?

[Hey, why aren't you speaking English back?]
The radish would go well with this too
[Fell in love with radish]
I really like the crunchiness
[2 Fantas 2,000 Won X 2]
[Must. Fuel.]
1 big bite!
[Takes the whole pot]
Is this going to be salty? Nah, it'll be alright
The sauce isn't salty at all
Delicious
There's only a little bit left I finished it all
[14:00 lunch end time]
[Help me]
[In Korean this time]
Do you want to grill right away?

[14:30 lunch/dinner start time] About 10 servings of brisket?
Are you sure about that?
[Brisket 7,900 Won X 10]
Let's do 1 soybean stew (5,900 Won), rice sushi (2,900 Won), and spicy chewy noodles (4,900 Won)
Here's the brisket
[Piles]
It looks so good
I love to grill this
Looks so tasty
It will cook pretty quickly, so I'll start eating right away
Just a sec, over here please
Thank you
1 more Fanta, please
Thank you
Thank you
[Fanta 2,900 Won]

Thank you
The stew looks really good
Bon appetit I'm so happy
So savory
The sauce is great
The fatty part is really good
This is what I'm talking about!
It's the best
With ssamjang this time (soybean chili seasoning paste)
Yummy
Need to hurry and get grilling!
[Complete]
It cooks really fast That's why I love brisket
Some rice
I've been wanting to try this rice sushi
Put some wasabi on it!

Put this on here
Looks tasty
It's slippery, be careful!
Wasabi and brisket goes so well together
It's so good Let's try the chewy noodles too
Put some brisket in here
On top
[Ta-da]
[Thumbs up]
Stew!
Looks good
There's a lot of brisket in here
Other places don't give you this much
Let's try the soup
The color already looks yummy
These 3 dishes go really well with brisket

I like the chewy noodles the most
That sweet & spicy goodness
With these chewy noodles
Need to hurry and grill
[Hurry hurry!]
I used to grill these 1 by 1
But it still works well grilling a bunch at once
[Can't let the grill just sit there]
[A mouthful]
Eating a mouthful of brisket is pretty addicting
[A bigger bite then]
Let's make a big sushi
A pile of brisket
[This is your 4th Fanta...]
That's a good amount
Hurry and cook!

[We cooked it with edits]
That's a brisket blanket
[Now to a warmer place]
[16:30 lunch/dinner finish time]
[Sike!] I'm going to order some more
Brisket with tripe It's their latest menu item
The name is really cute [Pronounced Chadol-Yang]
I'm Tzuyang
Are you eating more?! Yes!
I'll take 2 orders of the brisket with tripe (13,900 Won X 2)
And also the seafood sampler (6,900 Won)
[Calculating what she ate so far]
[Finished calculating]
I'll be back with your food
Here's the brisket & tripe Looks good!
This is the seafood

Here's the wasabi sauce
These 2 go well together
But you can also eat them with seafood or cheese
Looks yummy
Flip if the top part starts to sizzle
[Just like so]
Looks yummy!
2 each
2 octopus
2 scallops
A real 3-combo
[5 with tripe and brisket
1 Milkis, please (Korean beverage)
Thank you
Over here
Tripe

Put it on top of the scallop
Also the brisket
3-combo
That's crazy
Can you hear the crunchiness?
3-combo with the octopus this time
Put it on top after dipping
1 piece of tripe
On top
Amazing
With shrimp this time
Brisket and tripe
It's best with shrimp
It's just so savory with all of them together
How do I eat this one?
Just put it on the grill

It's a dipping sauce Dipping, right!
[2nd Milkis]
Last batch! Bon appetit!
[That much!?]
What kind of dipping sauce was this again?
Wasabi?!
I thought it was something like cheese
Just a little bit, guys
[17:40 dinner finish time]
Are you done now? Yes
22 servings! Really?
Thank you
I got to try different dishes here at Leechadol
I really enjoyed the meals here
I also think their price was very reasonable, rather cheap
Thanks everyone~

Thank you
We also do take-out orders
We packed more for you to eat at home Really? Thank you
This is Chadol-kun
A song will play if you press this
What's the total for today?
[Censored]
[Please leave a comment on how much the total bill would be!] [We will pick 50 winners for gift cards at Leechadol]
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to the 'Dream Community' welfare facility] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
